mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, content, msg_type, read_flag, sent_at, read_at FROM notify_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sent_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notify_message SET read_flag = 1, read_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notify_message (user_id, title, content, msg_type, read_flag, sent_at, read_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{msgType}, #{readFlag}, #{sentAt}, #{readAt})
